meta.description_ru: Пак токенов для генерации атмосферной фоновой музыки для фэнтези-игр в Suno.
meta.description_en: Token pack for generating atmospheric fantasy game background music in Suno.

ready_game_background_prompts.name: Peaceful Fantasy Village
ready_game_background_prompts.prompt: loopable fantasy game background music, peaceful medieval village, medieval lute, wooden flute, soft strings, subtle percussion, warm and nostalgic mood, non-intrusive background-friendly mix, no vocals
